name: AACarga_Tabla_RecepDocts

relations_found.evidence: FROM LUCCA663 L63 Left Join Usuarios U1 On U1.Codigo=L63.Usuario Where L63.Codigo=...

wl_code:
BuscaQry is Data Source
TableDeleteAll(TABLE_ReceptoresDoctos)
IF HExecuteSQLQuery(BuscaQry, MyConnectionLucca, hQueryWithoutCorrection + hNoBind,
"SELECT L63.Codigo, L63.Renglon, U1.NOMBRE " + ...
"FROM LUCCA663 L63 Left Join Usuarios U1 On U1.Codigo=L63.Usuario Where L63.Codigo=" + EDT_CODIGO +
" Order by L63.Renglon ") = False THEN
Error("HFSQL error: " + HErrorInfo())
END
HReadFirst(BuscaQry)
LOOP (HNbRec(BuscaQry))
TableAddLine(TABLE_ReceptoresDoctos, BuscaQry.Codigo, BuscaQry.Renglon, BuscaQry.Nombre)
HReadNext(BuscaQry)
END
Local procedure AACarga_TablaAut_Compras
